summary:
**Self-Review**
I found one concrete defect in the prior Loom patch: sorted Loom views could still apply `limit/offset` before filter-qualified groups were selected, which could hide valid groups under filtered pagination. I fixed that in [sqlite.rs](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/storage/sqlite.rs#L2407) and [postgres.rs](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/storage/postgres.rs#L1980), and I strengthened the evidence in [storage/tests.rs](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/storage/tests.rs#L573) with a paged sorted-view assertion at [storage/tests.rs](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/storage/tests.rs#L1059) that would have failed under the old behavior. I also removed formatter-only drift from `src/api/loom.rs` and `src/storage/loom.rs`, so they are clean again.

summary:
**Checkpoint**

Resolved the three substantive validator findings in-scope.

This pass changed [types.rs](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/locus/types.rs#L323), [workflows.rs](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/workflows.rs#L2912), and [micro_task_executor_tests.rs](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/tests/micro_task_executor_tests.rs#L716). No Loom-protected path was touched.

`TrackedMicroTask` now has canonical top-level `updated_at`, it is populated/backfilled through the registration path, and the direct registration test now asserts it is present and RFC3339. Work-packet registry support is no longer descriptor-only: `workflows.rs` now emits and validates `work_packets/<wp_id>/packet.json` and `summary.json` on create/update/gate/close/delete, and `locus_sync_task_board_v1` also refreshes those work-packet artifacts after task-board-driven status changes. I also added direct task-board projection coverage: one success path for emitted `task_board/index.json` and `task_board/views/default.json`, and one deterministic authority-scope validation failure case.

**Verification**

- `rustfmt --edition 2021 src/backend/handshake_core/src/locus/types.rs src/backend/handshake_core/src/workflows.rs src/backend/handshake_core/tests/micro_task_executor_tests.rs src/backend/handshake_core/tests/role_mailbox_tests.rs src/backend/handshake_core/src/locus/task_board.rs src/backend/handshake_core/src/runtime_governance.rs src/backend/handshake_core/src/role_mailbox.rs src/backend/handshake_core/src/api/role_mailbox.rs`
  Result: passed.

- `git diff --check -- src/backend/handshake_core/src/locus/types.rs src/backend/handshake_core/src/workflows.rs src/backend/handshake_core/tests/micro_task_executor_tests.rs src/backend/handshake_core/tests/role_mailbox_tests.rs src/backend/handshake_core/src/locus/task_board.rs src/backend/handshake_core/src/runtime_governance.rs src/backend/handshake_core/src/role_mailbox.rs src/backend/handshake_core/src/api/role_mailbox.rs`
  Result: passed. Only Git CRLF warnings.

- `$env:CARGO_TARGET_DIR='D:\Projects\LLM projects\Handshake\Handshake Worktrees\wt-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1\data\validator_followup_target_micro'; cargo test --test micro_task_executor_tests --no-run`
  Result: failed in native dependency build `libduckdb-sys v1.4.3`. Exact failure point was `cc-rs` invoking MSVC `cl.exe` on generated DuckDB C++ units under `...\data\validator_followup_target_micro\debug\build\libduckdb-sys-...\out\duckdb\...`, returning exit code `2`, before Rust could finish building the packet test target.

- `$env:CARGO_TARGET_DIR='D:\Projects\LLM projects\Handshake\Handshake Worktrees\wt-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1\data\validator_followup_target_role'; cargo test --test role_mailbox_tests --no-run`
  Result: failed at the same environmental point: `libduckdb-sys v1.4.3` native MSVC build, before the Rust test target completed.

That blocker does not indicate a product-code defect in this WP diff because both commands fail inside the bundled DuckDB native dependency build before the touched Rust code can complete target compilation or execute tests.

**Remaining risk**

- Rust semantic verification is still limited by the `libduckdb-sys` MSVC build failure above.
- Legacy work packets created before this patch, with no existing emitted `packet.json`, still have one compatibility caveat: storage does not persist `WorkPacketType`, so reconstruction falls back to the create-op hint when available, then existing `packet.json`, else `feature`. New and freshly emitted packets are covered by the new workflow path.
